children.text: Deals 1/8 damage to sleeping opponents per turn.
The wielder's Defense cannot be lowered.
Boosts power of Fire-type moves 50% when at 1/3 HP or less.
Protects the Pokémon from some ball and bomb moves.
Restores HP as well when the Pokémon eats a Berry.
The wielder's stats cannot be lowered.
Add Pokemon from their details screen
